title: ELM327 Capability Matrix by OEM
description: Definitive reference for what a standard ELM327 OBD-II adapter can and cannot do on each OEM. Used by ProcedureEngineer to set user expectations and route procedures to correct execution path.
common_symptoms: user asks what tool is needed
physical_solution: Reference only — no physical procedure. Use this matrix to inform user of tool limitations before starting a procedure.

technical_solution.elm327_feasibility: Full — this document IS the capability reference.
preconditions: ELM327 adapter connected to OBD-II port (pins 4/5/6/14/16)

procedure_steps.description: TOYOTA/LEXUS: Powertrain reads=FULL | Body reads=PARTIAL (most modules accessible) | Powertrain DTCs clear=FULL | Body DTCs clear=PARTIAL | RoutineControl $31=FULL pre-2022 | WriteDataByIdentifier $2E=PARTIAL | Gateway bypass needed=NO for most | Alternative adapter needed=NO | Verdict: BEST ELM327 compatibility of all OEMs.

HONDA/ACURA: Powertrain reads=FULL | Body reads=PARTIAL (F-CAN accessible, B-CAN limited) | Powertrain DTCs clear=FULL | Body DTCs clear=PARTIAL | RoutineControl $31=FULL on main CAN | WriteDataByIdentifier $2E=PARTIAL | Gateway bypass needed=NO for powertrain | Alternative adapter needed=NO | Verdict: VERY GOOD ELM327 compatibility. B-CAN body modules need HDS.

NISSAN/INFINITI: Powertrain reads=FULL | Body reads=PARTIAL (CAN-C accessible, CAN-B limited) | Powertrain DTCs clear=FULL | Body DTCs clear=PARTIAL | RoutineControl $31=FULL on main CAN | WriteDataByIdentifier $2E=PARTIAL | Gateway bypass needed=NO for powertrain | Alternative adapter needed=NO | Verdict: GOOD compatibility. CAN-B body modules need CONSULT.

FORD: Powertrain reads=FULL (HS-CAN) | Body reads=BLOCKED on MS-CAN modules (body on pins 3/11) | Powertrain DTCs clear=FULL | Body DTCs clear=BLOCKED | RoutineControl $31=FULL on HS-CAN | WriteDataByIdentifier $2E=PARTIAL | Gateway bypass needed=YES for MS-CAN body | Alternative adapter needed=MS-CAN capable adapter for body | Verdict: GOOD for powertrain, BLOCKED for body. Standard ELM327 misses all MS-CAN modules.

GM: Powertrain reads=FULL (HS-CAN) | Body reads=BLOCKED on SW-CAN (pin 1) | Powertrain DTCs clear=FULL | Body DTCs clear=BLOCKED | RoutineControl $31=FULL on HS-CAN | WriteDataByIdentifier $2E=PARTIAL | Gateway bypass needed=YES for SW-CAN | Alternative adapter needed=SW-CAN capable adapter | Verdict: GOOD for powertrain, BLOCKED for body/interior on SW-CAN. Standard ELM327 misses SW-CAN modules.

BMW F-SERIES (2012-2018): Powertrain reads=FULL | Body reads=PARTIAL (ZGW permits most reads) | Powertrain DTCs clear=FULL | Body DTCs clear=PARTIAL | RoutineControl $31=PARTIAL (most work) | WriteDataByIdentifier $2E=PARTIAL | Gateway bypass needed=PARTIAL | Alternative adapter needed=NO for most | Verdict: GOOD on F-series. ZGW present but permissive for most diagnostic operations.

BMW G-SERIES (2019+): Powertrain reads=FULL | Body reads=PARTIAL | Powertrain DTCs clear=FULL | Body DTCs clear=LIMITED | RoutineControl $31=LIMITED | WriteDataByIdentifier $2E=BLOCKED on most | Gateway bypass needed=YES for writes | Alternative adapter needed=ISTA or ENET cable for coding | Verdict: DEGRADED on G-series. ZGW significantly restricts write operations. Reads still work.

VW/AUDI PRE-2019: Powertrain reads=FULL | Body reads=FULL (J533 routes all) | Powertrain DTCs clear=FULL | Body DTCs clear=FULL | RoutineControl $31=FULL | WriteDataByIdentifier $2E=FULL | Gateway bypass needed=NO | Alternative adapter needed=NO | Verdict: EXCELLENT pre-2019. J533 transparent to ELM327 for all operations.

VW/AUDI 2019+ SFD: Powertrain reads=FULL | Body reads=FULL | Powertrain DTCs clear=FULL | Body DTCs clear=FULL | RoutineControl $31=READS ONLY | WriteDataByIdentifier $2E=BLOCKED | Gateway bypass needed=YES for writes | Alternative adapter needed=ODIS with SFD token for coding | Verdict: READS GREAT, WRITES BLOCKED. SFD protection added 2019+ locks adaptation/coding writes.

STELLANTIS PRE-2018: Powertrain reads=FULL | Body reads=FULL (CAN-C) | Powertrain DTCs clear=FULL | Body DTCs clear=FULL | RoutineControl $31=FULL | WriteDataByIdentifier $2E=FULL | Gateway bypass needed=NO | Verdict: EXCELLENT pre-2018. Very ELM327-friendly.

STELLANTIS 2018+ SGW: Powertrain reads=FULL | Body reads=LIMITED (CAN-IHS on pins 3/11 blocked) | Powertrain DTCs clear=FULL | Body DTCs clear=BLOCKED | RoutineControl $31=BLOCKED | WriteDataByIdentifier $2E=BLOCKED | Gateway bypass needed=YES | Alternative adapter needed=wiTECH or SGW bypass module | Verdict: READS OK, WRITES BLOCKED. SGW most restrictive gateway after 2018.

HYUNDAI/KIA PRE-2019: Powertrain reads=FULL | Body reads=FULL | Powertrain DTCs clear=FULL | Body DTCs clear=FULL | RoutineControl $31=FULL | WriteDataByIdentifier $2E=FULL | Gateway bypass needed=NO | Verdict: EXCELLENT pre-2019.

HYUNDAI/KIA 2019+: Powertrain reads=FULL | Body reads=FULL | Powertrain DTCs clear=FULL | Body DTCs clear=FULL | RoutineControl $31=READ TRIGGER OK | WriteDataByIdentifier $2E=BLOCKED on most | Gateway bypass needed=YES for adaptation writes | Alternative adapter needed=GDS2 for coding | Verdict: READS EXCELLENT. Writes blocked 2019+. Read-heavy procedures fully accessible.

oem_notes.Toyota/Lexus: Best overall ELM327 compatibility. Most procedures executable without OEM tool pre-2022. Recommend OEM tool for: immobilizer programming, smart key all-keys-lost.
oem_notes.Honda/Acura: Very good compatibility. Recommend OEM tool for: B-CAN body module work, immobilizer, transmission programming.
oem_notes.Nissan/Infiniti: Good compatibility. Recommend CONSULT for: CVT programming, ATTESA calibration, full body scan.
oem_notes.Ford: Good for engine/transmission. MS-CAN adapter required for: BCM, PATS, body module work. FDRS required 2018+ for many operations.
oem_notes.GM: Good for engine/transmission. SW-CAN adapter required for: BCM, PEPS, body module work.
oem_notes.BMW: F-series: good compatibility. G-series: reads only, ISTA for writes. Never rely on ELM327 alone for BMW coding.
oem_notes.VW/Audi: Pre-2019: best-in-class ELM327 support. 2019+: reads only. ODIS required for coding/adaptation.
oem_notes.Stellantis: Pre-2018: excellent. 2018+: reads only, wiTECH required for all service procedures that involve writes.
oem_notes.Hyundai/Kia: Pre-2019: excellent. 2019+: reads excellent, writes require GDS2. Good news: most diagnostic procedures are read-heavy.
